title: Pumpkin Stew
description: A comforting, buttery pumpkin stew from Portugal, perfect for a chilly evening.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, melt the butter over medium heat.
2. Add the onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
3. Add the garlic and cook for 1 minute.
4. Add the carrot and celery and cook for 5 minutes.
5. Add the pumpkin and cook for 5 minutes.
6. Pour in the broth and bring to a boil.
7. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the pumpkin is tender.
8. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
9. Serve hot, garnished with chopped parsley if desired.
